title: matricaria grandis
intro: Matricaria grandis, also known as the large flowered chamomile or large chamomile, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Matricaria grandis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of using Matricaria grandis include relief from anxiety, insomnia, digestive issues, and skin irritations, making it a popular herbal remedy. Matricaria grandis can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, allowing for its benefits to be tailored to individual needs.
